# modified version of https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9309.html#section-5.1
# i believe this covers most if not all of what is specified,
# including weird things found in the wild like spaces in product tokens

Disallow: /dontdisallowthis

User-Agent  : *
            Disallow: *.gif$
            Disallow: /example/
            Allow: /publications/
						Allow: /this/has/utf8/é/%C3%A9

						# foobot begins here
            User-Agent: bazbot
						User-Agent: foobot # this is foobot
            Disallow:/#random comment
            Allow:/example/page.html
            Allow:/example/allowed.gif

<p>random invalid line that should be ignored</p>

            User-Agent: bar bot
            Disallow: /example/page.html

            User-Agent: quxbot
